field.label: Enable FRP Server
field.help: Enable or disable the FRP server (frps).

field.label: Bind Port
field.help: Port to listen on (default: 7000).

field.label: Authentication Method
field.help: Authentication method for client connections.

field.label: Authentication Token
field.help: Token for client authentication.

field.label: Log Level
field.help: FRP server logging verbosity.

field.label: TCP Multiplexing
field.help: Enable TCP multiplexing.

field.label: Force TLS
field.help: Force clients to use TLS connections.

field.label: TCP Keepalive
field.help: TCP keepalive interval in seconds for frpc connections (default: 60, -1 to disable). Lower values prevent GFW from killing idle tunnels.

field.label: TCP Mux Keepalive Interval
field.help: Server-side TCP Mux keepalive interval in seconds (default: 30). Should match client setting.

field.label: Heartbeat Timeout
field.help: Heartbeat timeout in seconds (default: 90, -1 = auto, disabled when tcpMux is on).

field.label: Max Pool Count
field.help: Maximum connection pool size per client (default: 5).

field.label: KCP Bind Port
field.help: UDP port for KCP protocol (0 = disabled). Must match client KCP transport port.

field.label: QUIC Bind Port
field.help: UDP port for QUIC protocol (0 = disabled). Must match client QUIC transport port.

field.label: QUIC Keepalive Period
field.help: QUIC keepalive ping interval in seconds (default: 10). Only used when QUIC Bind Port is set.

field.label: QUIC Max Idle Timeout
field.help: Max QUIC idle time in seconds before connection closes (default: 30).

field.label: QUIC Max Streams
field.help: Max concurrent QUIC streams (default: 100000).

field.label: Max Ports Per Client
field.help: Maximum number of ports a single client can proxy (0 = unlimited).

field.label: UDP Packet Size
field.help: UDP packet size in bytes (default: 1500, range: 500-9000).

field.label: User Connection Timeout
field.help: Max time in seconds to wait for a work connection from client (default: 10). Increase for high-latency cross-border links.

field.label: Enable Dashboard
field.help: Enable the FRP web dashboard.

field.label: Dashboard Port
field.help: Dashboard listen port (default: 7500).

field.label: Dashboard Username
field.help: Dashboard login username (default: admin).

field.label: Dashboard Password
field.help: Dashboard login password.

field.label: Enable BBR
field.help: Enables BBR congestion control. WARNING: This is a system-wide kernel setting that affects ALL TCP connections, not just FRP.

field.label: Enable MSS Clamping
field.help: Clamps TCP MSS on WAN for FRP tunnel traffic. Fixes speed issues when cross-border links have low MTU (e.g., PPPoE). Recommended value: 1260 for MTU 1300.

field.label: MSS Value
field.help: Maximum Segment Size in bytes (default: 1260, range: 536-1460). Use 1260 to match Docker MTU 1300.

field.label: HTTP VHost Port
field.help: Port for HTTP proxy-type tunnels. When clients use http proxy type with customDomains, FRP server routes traffic based on Host header on this port (0 = disabled).

field.label: HTTPS VHost Port
field.help: Port for HTTPS proxy-type tunnels. When clients use https proxy type with customDomains, FRP server routes traffic based on SNI on this port (0 = disabled).
